label: About
title: About Hotel Mycelium Ledger
short_blurb: A daily generated front page where the image is the interface.
body: Daily Frontpage is a daily generated interactive front page. Each edition starts from recent saved signals and source research, becomes a new image-led scene, and stays explorable in the archive. The image is the interface: visible marks, objects, and surfaces in the scene open the real sources that shaped the day.

This iteration began with 91 recent saved-signal files and 76 captured links, then narrowed the page to 9 source windows around @briannekimmel: No one told me you can stay at Picasso’s favorite hotel where artists would pay... and Cantharellus cinereus, Cantharellus sinuosus, plus 7 more. A source image from mdl.artvee.com helped set the palette, contrast, edge behavior, and gesture. The scene became Hotel Mycelium Ledger: Hotel mycelium ledger: a torn poster wall composition in torn wall camera grammar, close and slightly oblique. One off-center branching botanical lithograph swells into a spatial rupture, its caps, gills, and cut stems becoming source-bearing apertures. After the image was made, a plate-reading pass mapped 9 visible regions and the mask audit tightened them against central botanical mushroom rupture, left vertical torn black backing seam, and upper horizontal torn paper lip.

typography.rationale: Bricolage Grotesque and Space Grotesk fit record, arcade, and listening-room editions while Fraunces keeps source captions tactile.
